{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321123346FFB9D97FB069A55815DB\"}"},"total":13606},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6990586923303764736","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"精彩万分，凡人修仙传之后读的最精彩的一部小说，希望作者加油能写200万字以上，都市—灵界—仙界—神界等等，慢慢写，我准备读10年你的小说！","text_exts":[{"e":9,"s":5,"text":"凡人修仙","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E5%87%A1%E4%BA%BA%E4%BF%AE%E4%BB%99\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774067626A55815DB%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%226990586923303764736%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226810622130124753933%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%87%A1%E4%BA%BA%E4%BF%AE%E4%BB%99%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1627622855,"group_id":"6810622130124753933","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0h9VRFo1WgOCpe+IiBceO+HQL+iNWK35kmVyBnzQGl2","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776614448\u0026x-signature=77B3F2V9HxLK4vsnQuBSstH5PAo%3D","user_id":"1741250876677591","user_name":"什么名字都不让我起.."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1741250876677591","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6810622130124753933","book_info":{"abstract":"九尘仙帝——秦风，被挚爱缥缈仙子暗算偷袭，却意外重生到千年之前的地球少年时代。我秦九尘的人生准则是：我的恩人，将得到百倍的报答；我的敌人，将承受三世的折磨。重活一世，只想快意恩仇，弥补前世的种种遗憾……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/834cdad8893527c40c2ce9d34fbeb3df","author":"七夜七月","author_id":"","book_id":"6810622130124753933","book_name":"都市之仙帝重生","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283848","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":124,\"name\":\"都市修真\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124\u0026name=都市修真\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":36,\"name\":\"重生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36\u0026name=重生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":384,\"name\":\"无敌\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384\u0026name=无敌\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":850,\"name\":\"无脑爽\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850\u0026name=无脑爽\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6810638585918652935","read_count":"56733","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4077439"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"1672","tags":"都市修真,无敌,都市,重生,无脑爽","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7d4505dd91a3610d7ce8777f9f3d9c51~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779251626\u0026x-signature=TYt0J8vEgwfPU4jmybMA%2BkDDafs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3900666877837844","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"569"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321123346FFB9D97FB069A55815DB\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读107小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":55,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":283695,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":383759,"reply_count":9,"show_pv":105315},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1627626413,"author_reply_time":1627626518,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7085353554705564416","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很好细节上的铺垫可以，让人唯一感觉不行就是功底不够深厚。就比如为什么男主穿越很莫名其妙对吧，这铺垫比较好，非常高深让一切的故事感觉活起来了不会让读者感觉又要加篇章，就比如主角为什么能得到轮回珠……\n主角其实就是正天仙帝转世，主角徒弟就是魔主，五行仙帝就是黑袍人。无名的话比较奇特，应该是潜龙界的主人吧，这是在我看了唯一能够解释的。\n世界观倒不会写的神界，其实他已经说了有很多这种类似仙界的世界，也说了仙界和魔界是实力差不多的，但也有高于仙界的世界。","text_exts":[{"e":127,"s":123,"text":"五行仙帝","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E4%BA%94%E8%A1%8C%E4%BB%99%E5%B8%9D\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774067626A55815DB%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227085353554705564416%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226810622130124753933%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%94%E8%A1%8C%E4%BB%99%E5%B8%9D%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1649687436,"group_id":"6810622130124753933","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1TpMMj4QOvMbqZM4abc11okQCiD4+GZLReIII5M55Hy","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2925135521388655","user_name":"爱吃带鱼汤的饶兄"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2925135521388655","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_rankl
